runner_response_json.user_facing_response: I'm beginning my analysis by listing the files in the repository root, checking the .gitignore rules, and seeing if export.zip already exists. This will help me understand what needs to be included or excluded from the export.
runner_response_json.brief_rationale: These initial inspections will ground the critical recoverable slots needed to make informed decisions about what to include in the export while respecting the high-risk nature of the task.
